title: clerodendrum fastigiatum
intro: Clerodendrum fastigiatum, also known as the Butterfly Tree or Glory Bower, is a tropical flowering plant native to Malaysia and Indonesia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum fastigiatum are numerous, including its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
